query: I want to run a two-sample t-test on tumor sizes between treatment and control. n = 30 per group. Check the assumptions.
expected_behavior: Recommends Shapiro-Wilk per group (or Anderson-Darling) as the Normality check
Recommends Levene's test (or Brown-Forsythe) as the equal-variance check

Produces a per-assumption table with verdicts (or a clearly-labeled equivalent structure with at minimum Assumption, Test, and Verdict columns) AND names the alternative test to switch to if a verdict fails
